title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability and reliability improvements. We resolved critical issues affecting Salesforce and HubSpot integrations that were preventing some automations from running properly. We also improved how the platform handles multi-step deployment workflows and enhanced detection of complex Salesforce field configurations.

entries.headline: Restored missing data from weeks 12 and 13
Better Salesforce field validation and deployment reliability
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce uses State and Country picklists, preventing common configuration errors
Deployment processes are more reliable with enhanced permission checking and retry capabilities
